name: archmarshal
description: Codex-native, safety-first governance for projects, Skills, memory, and reproducible closeouts.

interface.shortDescription: Safely govern Codex projects and reusable Skills.
interface.longDescription: ArchMarshal is a Codex-native management plugin that organizes project and Skill lifecycles without rewriting existing user content. It provides review-first adoption, bounded health diagnostics, date/tag project organization, evidence-based closeout, and deliberate reusable-Skill learning.
defaultPrompt: Safely organize this project and its Skills with ArchMarshal.
Audit this project's ArchMarshal health without changing files.
Close this project with reproducible evidence and reusable Skill candidates.
